visa_types.name: Business / Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

 Checklist  
List of travel insurance
visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > idn > en > Table:Visiting Family and Friends > Visa Fees 1]
Service Fee: IDR 246.000
Mode of Payment: Cash/Credit/Debit/QRIS for Jakarta and Surabaya. Paid in IDR as per the current exchange rate used.
Service fee and other Additional service fee are not refundable once the payment is made.
Free visa
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)
visa_types.processing_time: General processing time is 15 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
visa_types.forms:
Schengen Application Form English
Schengen Application Form Hungarian
visa_types.overview:
Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Jakarta for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of business travel including conference.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment. The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Jakarta for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of business travel including conference.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment. The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000.

## Visa Fees

[hun > idn > en > Table:Visiting Family and Friends > Visa Fees 1]
Service Fee: IDR 246.000
Mode of Payment: Cash/Credit/Debit/QRIS for Jakarta and Surabaya. Paid in IDR as per the current exchange rate used.
Service fee and other Additional service fee are not refundable once the payment is made.
Free visa
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

 Checklist  
List of travel insurance

## Photo Specifications
The photograph must be:
- Colored
- With white background
- With size 3,5 x 4,5  cm

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms
Schengen Application Form English
Schengen Application Form Hungarian

Schengen Application Form Hungarian
visa_types.overview:
Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Jakarta for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Hungary the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment. The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Jakarta for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Hungary the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment. The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000.

## Visa Fees

[hun > idn > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
Service Fee: IDR 246.000
Mode of Payment: Cash/Credit/Debit/QRIS for Jakarta and Surabaya. Paid in IDR as per the current exchange rate used.
Service fee and other Additional service fee are not refundable once the payment is made.
Free visa
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

 Checklist  
List of travel insurance

## Photo Specifications
The photograph must be:
- Colored
- With white background
- With size 3,5 x 4,5  cm

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms

Schengen Application Form Hungarian

You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment. The insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000. 
The possession of a visa does not give you an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country.
